plugins.name: cowork-obsidian
plugins.description: Wire Claude Cowork to a local Obsidian vault — connect to an existing vault or build a new one. Auto-detects existing vaults. Three modes (external / overlay / scaffold). Sync across machines (Obsidian Sync, Syncthing, or Git/GitHub). Optional Claude Desktop MCP. Multi-vault aware. Three canonical prompts (build / update / health-check) and a weekly rhythm that compounds for years.
